title: stolonochloa pygmaea
intro: Stolonochloa pygmaea, also known as Dwarf Leptochloa, is a type of grass species native to tropical Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce swelling and alleviate pain. In traditional herbal medicine, Stolonochloa pygmaea is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, with its leaves and stems being used to make teas or infusions for medicinal purposes.
